plain_english: Only one source has touched FLOKI, and even he is lukewarm: a small buy near current support (~0.0000240) with a tight stop just below ~0.0000235, aiming up toward the ~0.0000455 and ~0.0000490 resistance bands. He openly calls it 'not very likely' and is waiting for the price to dip back and re-test support before doing anything. This is a low-conviction meme-coin scalp, not a core idea — so the right move is to wait and only consider it if price actually pulls back to that support and holds.
